description: Sprint 8 EC-IPC-001..010 enumerates 10 edge cases but is missing several wire-shape edges that are observable from the existing handler implementations and the TS↔Rust contract: (1) `select_past_note` for a note that fails the vault scan (file unreadable / disappeared mid-scan in feed.rs:339-374): `scan_vault_feed` silently drops failed entries, but `select_past_note` (feed.rs:243-269) still proceeds and the `body` lookup at line 257 returns `""` via `unwrap_or("")`. The emitted variant would be `editing` with `currentNoteId` of a missing note and `isNoteEmpty: true` — there is NO EC-IPC for this. (2) `cancel_switch` when there is no preceding `save-failed` state (i.e., user cancels a `switching` state directly): REQ-IPC-015 still emits `editing` with `focusedBlockId: null`, but the TS reducer's 'retained priorFocusedBlockId' is undefined in this path (see FIND-074). (3) `body=""` vs `body="\n"` vs `body="  "` (whitespace-only) for `isNoteEmpty`: §15.4 line 1258 says Sprint 8 emits `isNoteEmpty = body.is_empty()` — a strict byte-empty check — meaning `body="\n"` would emit `isNoteEmpty: false`, while the canonical `note.isEmpty()` (NoteOps) would return `true` for whitespace-only. EC-IPC-010 covers `body=""` only; the whitespace-only case is undefined. (4) `request_new_note` racing with the FIRST emit subscriber: the `app.emit` in editor.rs:354 may fire BEFORE the TS-side `subscribeToEditorState` listener is registered during app cold start. Tauri events are not buffered. No EC-IPC covers the emit-before-subscribe race.

fileEvidence.snippet: note.isEmpty() evaluation on the Rust side from raw bytes: Sprint 8 emits isNoteEmpty = body.is_empty() as a conservative byte-level check; richer block-based emptiness (whitespace-only) is owned by capture-auto-save.

### 15.3 Edge cases (EC-IPC-001..010)
... (10 cases enumerated; no row for failed vault scan, no row for cancel_switch without preceding save-failed, no row for body="\n", no row for emit-before-subscribe race)

recommendation: Add four EC-IPC entries: (a) EC-IPC-011 — `select_past_note(noteId)` for a noteId not present in scan_vault_feed's metadata: `body` resolves to `""`, emitted variant is `editing` with `isNoteEmpty: true`. (b) EC-IPC-012 — `cancel_switch` invoked when the prior state is `switching` (not `save-failed`): emitted variant is `editing` with `focusedBlockId: null` AND the TS reducer must NOT reach for a non-existent `priorFocusedBlockId`. (c) EC-IPC-013 — `body="\n"` (whitespace-only, byte-non-empty): emitted `isNoteEmpty: false` with explicit warning that this differs from `NoteOps.isEmpty()` — and the TS Copy button enable matrix uses the byte-level check until block parsing is added. (d) EC-IPC-014 — emit-before-subscribe race for `request_new_note` during cold start: caller must `await listenReady` (or equivalent) before invoking `request_new_note`.
